text.title: Press & PR Coverage Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
no real news — defer until newsworthy event
build 3+ Tier-3 coverage before Tier-1 outreach
research last 5 articles + beat per journalist
trim pitch to <150 words + 3 explicit assets
send pitch; track reply rate weekly

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=double-followup-then-stop
